text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My fav horsegirl is live streaming today!♪ 
I've gotta check out her new merch and 
peep her socials too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And! Tomorrow's her concert! But I have 
homework and training to do…

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh… There's just way too much good content… How am I… supposed to keep up…

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
…with all this HAPPINEEEEESS?! 
Ahhh, this is perfect! I'm living my best life!
